title: polygala vulgaris f. pyxophylla
intro: Polygala vulgaris f. pyxophylla, also known as the common or European polygala, is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the Polygalaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to stimulate the immune system. The health benefits of Polygala vulgaris f. pyxophylla include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its possible use in treating anxiety and depression. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
